name: Calculadora de Área del Triángulo
desc: Calcula Área = (base × altura) / 2. Ejemplo: base 8 m, altura 5 m = Área = 20 m². Calculadora gratuita y precisa, sin registro.
description: Calcula Área = (base × altura) / 2. Ejemplo: base 8 m, altura 5 m = Área = 20 m². Calculadora gratuita y precisa, sin registro.
seo_description: Usa la Calculadora de Área del Triángulo gratis para obtener resultados exactos en segundos. Solo introduce tus valores, sin registro.
example_label: Calculate the área of a triangular roof section with 14.5m base and 8.75m height for material estimation

range_hints.base: Typical: 1-100m for construction; any positive value
range_hints.altura: Must be perpendicular height; range: 0.5-200m typical

result_context: The área ({area}) represents the surface of the triangle, calculated as half the product of base and perpendicular height.

steps.description: Result: Triangle area equals 63.44 square units

mistakes: Using slant height instead of perpendicular height from base to apex
Forgetting to divide by 2 (calculating as rectangle instead)
Not ensuring height is measured at 90° to the base
